name: astropy
description: Core Python library for astronomy and astrophysics workflows that need Astropy APIs, including units/quantities, coordinates, FITS I/O, tables, time systems, WCS, and cosmology. Use when implementing or debugging astrono

interface.shortDescription: Core Python library for astronomy and astrophysics workflows that need Astropy APIs, including units/quantities, coordin
interface.longDescription: Core Python library for astronomy and astrophysics workflows that need Astropy APIs, including units/quantities, coordinates, FITS I/O, tables, time systems, WCS, and cosmology. Use when implementing or debugging astrono
